approved_at_basis: recording-time bound: the chat message arrived minutes before this timestamp was captured; no earlier machine timestamp exists for the chat channel

note: Immutable delegation-basis record. It grants no execution authority by itself; authority arises only through an execution manifest plus an authorization record binding this artifact's path and hash.
